helpful: The provisioned petition and questions presented exposed the dispositive Munsingwear equities.
The docket snapshot showed the response request and the absence of a filed response.
The statpack provided the whole-docket and Fourth Circuit base rates.
gaps: The ranged corpus remote was unreachable, so no structured comparable-case priors could be pulled.
CourtListener search result identifiers did not map reliably to the opinion-item endpoint.
notes: CourtListener MCP search was available for general pre-disposition doctrine research. The failed corpus query produced no rows and is therefore reported as unused rather than as a successful corpus lookup.
